title: Software Update - DFU - Turn off the device before starting DFU
scenario: DFU fails gracefully with "Update currently not available" popup when device is powered off before starting firmware update
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has an available firmware update.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
6. Turn off the device (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the device powers down).
7. Observe the app screen. Expected: The app remains on the "Software Update" screen with no change.
10. Observe the popup that appears. Expected: A popup displays the message "Update currently not available, please try back later".
12. Observe the resulting screen. Expected: The popup closes and the user is returned to the "Three Easy Steps" screen.
expected: 1. App remains on the "Software Update" screen after turning off the device. 2. After tapping Continue and Start Update, a popup appears: "Update currently not available, please try back later". 3. After tapping OK, the popup closes and the user is returned to the "Three Easy Steps" screen.
